name: USB Device Enumeration (All Classes)
categoryDescription: Hardware device connection history — USB storage, Bluetooth, portable devices, and imaging hardware.
description: All USB devices connected to the system regardless of class — keyboards, mice, hubs, audio, HID, as well as storage. Uses VID/PID (Vendor/Product ID) identifiers rather than the class-based USBSTOR format.
forensic_value: Broader than USBSTOR — captures non-storage USB devices including USB rubber ducky (HID attack tools), hardware keyloggers, and specialized attack hardware. VID:PID combinations can be looked up to identify specific device models.
